description: User scenario profiles that dynamically adjust category weights and rule multipliers

student.label: Student
student.description: College/university student with moderate social media usage and shared devices
student.context_note: Students frequently use public campus WiFi and share devices, making data exposure and network security higher priority.

working_professional.label: Working Professional
working_professional.description: Corporate employee handling sensitive work data and using banking/finance apps regularly
working_professional.context_note: Professionals handle financial and corporate data. Account compromise and phishing attacks are disproportionately costly.

high_social_media.label: High Social Media User
high_social_media.description: Power user on Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X with large follower base and public presence
high_social_media.context_note: Public social media presence dramatically increases risk of targeted social engineering, identity theft, and doxing attacks.

senior_citizen.label: Senior Citizen
senior_citizen.description: Older adult using internet primarily for communication, banking, and shopping
senior_citizen.context_note: Senior citizens are disproportionately targeted by phishing and tech-support scams. Behavioral security is weighted higher.

developer.label: Software Developer
developer.description: Tech professional managing code repositories, API keys, and cloud infrastructure
developer.context_note: Developers often have access to sensitive infrastructure. A compromised account can affect entire systems and teams.
